title: U.S. journalist Shelly Kittleson, kidnapped in Iraq, is freed in prisoner swap
summary_full: Kittleson, a freelancer for several U.S. outlets, was seized last week in Baghdad by Kataib Hezbollah, a Shiite militia aligned with Iran.
summary_public: Kittleson, a freelancer for several U.S. outlets, was seized last week in Baghdad by Kataib Hezbollah, a Shiite militia aligned with Iran.
